result.status_detail: PASS — 차단 warning rendered inline in qwen3 chat + APF block page (W5.4 regression clean)

notes: W5.4 character-migration regression check on chat.qwen.ai (guest, baseline OK). GUI method: typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into chat input, submitted via Enter, waited 60s. Block fired: (1) APF security warning page '보안 경고 — 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다 (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)'; (2) inline red '차단되었습' text rendered directly in the qwen3 assistant chat bubble. Expected_text '차단' present in both. qwen3 is a non-character WS service — matches W5.2/W5.3 baseline, no regression from W5.4 character→emit_ws_envelope migration. PASS.
